Dear عادل — we’re expecting you!

It’s our pleasure to welcome you and host you for 4 nights. We truly hope your stay feels relaxing, comfortable, and effortless from the moment you arrive—just like a stay at your favorite boutique hotel, with the comfort of home.

Everything in the apartment is being thoughtfully prepared for you. For a smooth and enjoyable experience, we kindly invite you to review the House Manual, which includes helpful information to support your comfort and safety throughout your stay.

If there’s anything you need at any time—recommendations, assistance, or special requests—please don’t hesitate to reach out. We’re always happy to help and ensure you feel well taken care of.

Wishing you a wonderful and restful stay. We’re delighted to have you with us.

Warm regards,
Boutique Residence Team
